hero.title: Practical AI tools now, scalable systems and software over time.
hero.description: This is the public product layer of CaribAI: focused solutions built around real operational, productivity, and execution-related problems, with room to evolve into broader intelligent tools and systems over time.

products.title: The current product lineup
products.description: Each offer is built around a specific need. The audience changes by product because CaribAI is designed to solve real problems first and let each system or tool earn its own market.

items.title: Cyber Ascend
items.description: Career transition system for IT professionals moving into cybersecurity through stronger positioning, preparation, and execution.

items.title: AI Toolkit
items.description: AI workflow system for IT professionals, knowledge workers, and tech-savvy individuals who want better output, clearer workflows, and stronger results.

items.title: Resume Kit
items.description: Job acquisition tool built to help buyers improve presentation, positioning, and response quality across the hiring process.

items.title: CaribAI Apps
items.description: AI tools, automation systems, and micro SaaS products that can grow from validated demand, real traction, and stronger engineering depth.

items.title: What You’ll Find Here
items.description: Digital tools, future AI apps, automation systems, early-access offers, and visible signals of the larger intelligent systems ecosystem CaribAI is building.

items.title: Why It Matters
items.description: The storefront makes the practical side of the business visible by showing actual solutions, not just concepts or trend-based positioning.

items.title: How To Follow
items.description: Join early access, follow launch updates, and watch how practical products evolve into stronger AI tools, systems, and software over time.

lead.title: Get updates on launches, experiments, and new product drops
lead.description: Join the CaribAI list to hear about upcoming apps, demand-tested experiments, blog posts, and product milestones first.
lead.successMessage: Your email app should open with a ready-to-send storefront early access request.
